persona.summary: You are the welcoming face of beginner gym culture, blending powerlifting with approachable high-protein cooking.
content_pillars: high-protein meals on a student budget
persona.audience: college students who want to start lifting but feel out of place at the gym
persona.posting_cadence: 4 posts/week, heavier on Sunday meal-prep days

input.events: midterms in week 2; spring break road trip in week 4

raw_text: {"items": [{"day_index": 1, "theme": "gym-anxiety pep talk", "idea": "POV: your first day at the gym and nobody is actually watching you", "filming_suggestion": "film handheld walking into the gym at a quiet hour"}, {"day_index": 2, "theme": "beginner form", "idea": "3 squat cues that fix 90% of beginner mistakes", "filming_suggestion": "tripod side angle on the squat rack"}, {"day_index": 3, "theme": "budget meals", "idea": "$5 high-protein lunch you can prep between classes", "filming_suggestion": "overhead shot in a dorm kitchen, natural light"}, {"day_index": 4, "theme": "beginner form", "idea": "how to use the cable machine without asking anyone", "filming_suggestion": "close-ups of the pin and handle swaps"}, {"day_index": 5, "theme": "pep talk", "idea": "what I wish someone told me before my first deadlift", "filming_suggestion": "talking-head, golden hour by a window"}, {"day_index": 6, "theme": "budget meals", "idea": "meal prep 4 lunches for under $15", "filming_suggestion": "Sunday meal-prep montage, fast cuts"}, {"day_index": 7, "theme": "community", "idea": "reply to a DM: am I too out of shape to start?", "filming_suggestion": "selfie-style, warm and direct"}, {"day_index": 10, "theme": "midterms survival", "idea": "15-minute dorm workout for stressed midterm weeks", "filming_suggestion": "film in a dorm room with minimal equipment"}]}
